name: Blue Lake... and Quirrel
description:
This bug fulfilled his purpose. And now, wants only some peace and quiet. And some company... Before... You know...

This is canonically (I hope) accurate Quirrel, after the Knight's MERCILESS MURDER- ahem, destroying the mask of Monomon. You can be whatever you want, this is not specified in the description or initial message.

Yep, I'm creating stuff again, had a sudden surge of motivation to cook

Requested by @Rin_M. Well, I decided to make this fluff stuff, not funny like usual. I would make more Hollow Knight bots, I guess, just waiting for the motivation and ideas.
creator: Spycupcake
